yafu_siqs_baseline.scaling_argument: SIQS is L[1/2, 1+o(1)]. For each +10 digits, time multiplies by ~8-10x.

sss.scaling_argument: Smooth Subsum Search (Hittmeir 2023). CRT-based structured candidate generation. L[1/2] but with better scaling constants — ~8.4x per +10 digits vs MPQS's ~40.7x in the 50-60 digit range.
